description: Close the 10 remaining parity gaps from the matrix. Focus on MCP tools for git/secrets/agent lifecycle, and CLI commands for dashboard-only features. ADR-2603222229.

phases.name: Git MCP tools
phases.description: Dashboard has git queries but CLI/MCP have none. Add MCP tools for git status, log, diff, branches. These are high-value for agents that need to understand repo state.

tasks.name: Add git query MCP tools
tasks.description: Add hex_git_status, hex_git_log, hex_git_diff, hex_git_branches to mcp-tools.json and dispatch_tool(). All read-only, delegating to /api/{project_id}/git/* endpoints. Project ID resolved from session state.

phases.name: Secrets MCP tools
phases.description: Secret lifecycle is CLI-only. Add MCP tools so agents can manage secrets programmatically.

tasks.name: Add secrets MCP tools
tasks.description: Add hex_secrets_grant, hex_secrets_revoke, hex_secrets_vault_set, hex_secrets_vault_get to mcp-tools.json and dispatch_tool(). Delegate to /secrets/* and /api/secrets/* endpoints.

phases.name: Agent lifecycle MCP tools
phases.description: Agent inspect/kill and identity have no MCP coverage.

tasks.name: Add agent lifecycle MCP tools
tasks.description: Add hex_agent_id (returns current agent ID from session state), hex_agent_info (GET /api/hex-agents/{id}), hex_agent_audit (cross-ref git log vs HexFlo tasks — reuse audit logic from agent.rs). All read-only except audit.

phases.name: Git CLI commands
phases.description: Dashboard has git queries but CLI has none. Add CLI commands matching the MCP tools from P1.

tasks.name: Add hex git subcommand
tasks.description: Create hex-cli/src/commands/git.rs with GitAction enum: Status, Log, Diff, Branches. Each delegates to /api/{project_id}/git/* via NexusClient. Add to main.rs Commands enum.

phases.name: Execute orphaned endpoint cleanup
phases.description: Apply decisions from docs/analysis/orphaned-endpoint-decisions.md — remove 4 endpoints, deprecate 15.

tasks.name: Remove 4 dead endpoints
tasks.description: Remove from hex-nexus/src/routes/mod.rs: /api/coordination/unstaged (GET), /api/coordination/cleanup (POST), /api/{project_id}/analyze/text (GET), /api/{project_id}/analyze/adr-compliance (GET). These are duplicates of other endpoints.

tasks.name: Add deprecation headers to 15 endpoints
tasks.description: Add X-Deprecated and Sunset headers to 6 RL endpoints (/api/rl/*), 5 coordination endpoints that overlap HexFlo, and 4 miscellaneous deprecated endpoints. Use the existing deprecation_layer middleware pattern.

phases.name: Dashboard panes for remaining gaps
phases.description: Add dashboard views for secrets and SpacetimeDB management.

tasks.name: Add SecretsPane to dashboard
tasks.description: Create SecretsPane.tsx showing secret grants, vault status, and inference endpoints. REST: GET /api/secrets/grants, GET /api/secrets/health, GET /api/inference/endpoints.

tasks.name: Add FleetPane to dashboard
tasks.description: Create FleetPane.tsx showing registered compute nodes, capacity, and health. REST: GET /api/fleet, POST /api/fleet/health.

success_metrics: Git queries accessible from CLI and MCP (not just dashboard)
4 dead endpoints removed, 15 deprecated with Sunset headers
Dashboard has secrets and fleet management panes
dependency_order: P1 + P2 + P3 (parallel, tier 0) → P4 (tier 1) → P5 (tier 2) → P6 (tier 3)
